results.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 | ​Japan delivers commanding 4-0 win over Tunisia in 1,000th ⁠match
results.description: Ayase Ueda: Japan thrashed Tunisia 4-0 in the FIFA World Cup 2026, with Ueda scoring twice and setting up Junya Ito. Daichi Kamada also scored as Japan moved to the brink of the knockout stage, while Tunisia exited after a second defeat.

results.title: Amitabh Bachchan, Farhan Akhtar, Ranbir Kapoor & More BTown Celebs Attend A Grand Wedding Ceremony
results.description: Revathi Sule, daughter of NCP (SP) leader Supriya Sule, tied the knot with Sarang Lakhani in a grand wedding ceremony held in Mumbai on June 20. The star-studded celebration brought together prominent names from Bollywood, business, and politics. Amitabh Bachchan, Jaya Bachchan, Shweta Bachchan, Ranbir Kapoor, and Farhan Akhtar were among the notable guests spotted at the event. Videos and photos from the wedding have gone viral online, offering glimpses of the lavish festivities and high-profile attendees, making it one of the most talked-about society weddings of the year. Watch video!#RevathiSuleWedding #RanbirKapoor #AmitabhBachchan

results.title: Assam CM Proposes Digital Platform to Boost Homestay Tourism
results.description: Assam's Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma has proposed a new digital platform aimed at promoting homestays across the state. This initiative is designed to enhance the tourism sector by making it easier for international visitors to discover and book authentic local experiences. Emphasizing the importance of nature-based and community-driven tourism, Sarma highlighted the need for immersive experiences over traditional luxury accommodations. The proposed platform will serve as a central hub for booking homestays, benefiting local entrepreneurs and enhancing Assam's global tourism image. With upcoming international engagements, the state aims to reshape its perception and attract more tourists.

results.title: Nirmala Sitharaman offers prayers at Kamakhya Temple before Ambubachi Mela
results.description: Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman offered prayers at Kamakhya Temple in Guwahati ahead of the Ambubachi Mela, starting June 22, attracting lakhs of devotees.

results.title: IND v AFG 2026: “You keep learning...,” Prasidh Krishna highlights fierce competition with teammates after 5-fer in 3rd ODI
results.description: Prasidh Krishna produced a sensational, career-best spell of 5 for 23 in 8.2 overs during the third ODI against Afghanistan at Chepauk on Saturday (June 20), leading India to a 3-0 series sweep. The lanky pacer heavily exploited the seam and bounce early on, removing Rahmanullah Gurbaz, Ibrahim Zadran, Rahmat Shah, and Darwish Rasooli inside the first 10 overs. Afghanistan's captain Hashmatullah Shahidi (102 off 131) and Azmatullah Omarzai (50) managed to rebuild. However, Prasidh returned to the attack and wrapped up the innings by dismissing Shahidi, securing his maiden ODI five-wicket haul. The visitors were bundled out for 218 runs. India comfortably chased the target with nine wickets and 128 deliveries to spare, fueled by 170-run partnership for the opening wicket between Yashasvi Jaiswal (110* off 86) and Rohit Sharma (79 off 69). Speaking during the post-match presentation after receiving the Player-of-the-Match award, Prasidh Krishna credited his success to tactical "homework" and the fierce, healthy competition in the nets shared with world-class teammates in both the national squad and his IPL franchise, the Gujarat Titans (GT). “Yeah, ice bath's the only thing remaining now, so body feels good. Bit of a break after the innings, but good to see the way the batsmen batted. I'm really, really happy for the team,” Prasidh said. “(Can you give us an idea of what you've been doing?) Yeah, I think it's just that kind of hit the length that, as a team, whatever we discussed, what the tactic is, just trying to do that a lot more and also preparation-wise. You just sit back and think about what the games have been like, what you actually want to do, spend more time thinking about it. And it's just the homework, I would say, that has been really good,” he added. “(On having a good bunch of bowlers around him in GT and the Indian team) Honestly, that's really helpful when you have some real good bowlers alongside. You keep learning from each other. There's always a competition in the nets. So that's what keeps you going when you have the right kind of group around you. You always push each other to do better and I think that's paid off,” he remarked. When asked if he wanted to bowl a sixth over to secure his five-for, Prasidh admitted the thought crossed his mind but decided to keep a level head. He was ultimately thrilled with the milestone but maintained that the team's victory mattered most. “Yeah, I did get that thought for a bit, but then I told myself I've still got a lot of the game to go. But then I came back in and I saw, look, four wickets, five wickets, I am definitely happier with the five, but if I hadn't got it, I'm sure we'd still end up on the winning side. So I'm happy with that,” he concluded.

results.title: US VP Vance lands in Switzerland for technical talks with Iran
results.description: Zurich: US Vice President JD Vance landed in Switzerland on Sunday (local time) for US-Iran talks, as reported by CNN, citing the update by his office. US Vice President JD Vance and Second Lady Usha Vance departed for Switzerland on Saturday (local time) for technical-level talks with Iran, following the signing of the 14-point memorandum [...] The post US VP Vance lands in Switzerland for technical talks with Iran appeared first on KalingaTV .
